other_observers: Dave Moore, Mary Backiel, Bob Hare and his friend Sandy; Paul and Polly Neldner
specific_location: The first 1/2 mile of County Road 360...in sub-irrigated hayfield
description: Front and head all black with straw-colored nape, white rump and scauplars. Pointed tail feathers...pointed wings in flightBehaviors: Birds were seen on the ground flying and chasing one another and perched on grass stalks, fence posts and fences. Would fly up and then disappear into the grass.Call: Heard and heard well. Compared with song on iPod and bird was seen singing several timesPlumage: Adult Breeding
photographer: Photographer: Polly Wren Neldner, Polly Neldner
